description: It is a legacy TypeScript SDK for interacting with the AvaCloud API and enterprise services, which is currently migrating to ChainKit
It is a powerful toolset designed to simplify integration with Avalanche's suite of blockchain services and smart contracts
It provides a modern TypeScript SDK for interacting with the Avalanche network across its primary chains through JSON-RPC APIs
It is a specialized TypeScript SDK allowing developers to interact with Avalanche Interchain Messaging (AWM) and Teleporter protocols
It is a Golang-based development kit utilized primarily for Avalanche node operations, network validators, and custom Subnet creation
It is a dedicated library for creating, managing, and authenticating decentralized non-custodial wallets specifically on the Avalanche network
It is the classic Avalanche Platform JavaScript library for interfacing directly with the X-Chain, P-Chain, and C-Chain environments
